message:
feat(runtime,store,conformance): refactor slowlog out of runtime, expand store ops and ACL conformance

- fr-runtime/lib.rs: remove deprecated SlowlogEntry struct and slowlog
  ring buffer from ServerState in favor of consolidated approach,
  clean up ACL save line formatting, streamline server state defaults
- fr-store/lib.rs: expand store with additional data structure operations
  for broader Redis command coverage
- fr-command/lib.rs: expand command dispatch with additional Redis
  command implementations
- fr-conformance: add ACL journey conformance test fixture
  (fr_p2c_004_acl_journey.json) and expand conformance testing library
- fr-server/main.rs: minor server integration updates

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
